name: LibTV AI 创作
examples_zh: 用 LibTV 生成一张赛博朋克风格的咖啡新品海报图，包含霓虹灯和产品特写
把这张产品静态图转成 8 秒短视频，镜头从包装正面推进到品牌 Logo
为短剧预告生成一段文生视频：雨夜街头、主角回头、电影感冷色调
examples_en: Use LibTV to generate a cyberpunk coffee product poster with neon lighting and a close-up product shot
Turn this static product image into an 8-second video that pushes from the package front to the brand logo
Create a text-to-video short drama teaser with a rainy street, the protagonist turning back, and a cinematic cool tone
